title: [Task Sprint] QA Testing Report — GoThru Maps Frontend

issues.display_title: Issue #80: Update Expanded Click Area to Be Transparent and Not White
issues.main_description_html:
• Expand the clickable area just a bit more

QA Tester Summary - Issue #80: Expanded Click Area Transparent

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/blue-line-click.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.gothru.co

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White Blue line renders bvXFa88w4lxWeol7PBtv?d=47.573722379712024,7.569044256497364,18 -> map renders with line Pass
2 Gray On-line click Click visible blue line -> opens TourMkr pano Pass
3 Black Expanded click area Click/tap 10px outside visible stroke -> opens same TourMkr pano Pass
4 Mobile Expanded tap area Mobile tap 10px outside visible stroke -> opens same TourMkr pano Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Desktop on-line click opened https://tourmkr.com/F17H8y7zYB/39478330p.
  • Desktop off-line click at 10px from the visible stroke opened https://tourmkr.com/F17H8y7zYB/39478330p.
  • Mobile off-line tap at 10px from the visible stroke opened https://tourmkr.com/F17H8y7zYB/39478330p.
  • HTTP 5xx responses: 0.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.gothru.co/{moderationId}?d={lat,lng,zoom} -> moderation page -> vector tile source -> line/circle layers -> click handler opens TourMkr pano.

Request / Service Observed status Count Frontend outcome Review
POST maps.gothru.co/bvXFa88w4lxWeol7PBtv 200 1 Moderation map data loaded Pass
GET maps.gothru.co/data/moderation_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200 6 Blue-line vector features rendered Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/style.json 200 1 Base map style loaded Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/data/openmaptiles.json 200 1 Base tile source loaded Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/data/openmaptiles/14/8536/5724.pbf 200 1 Base map tile rendered Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/fonts/* 200 5 Map labels available Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/sprite.* 200 2 Map sprite assets available Pass
GET maps.gothru.co/icon/markers/*.webp 200 2 Marker icons loaded Pass
Any backend/API 5xx 0 found 0 No server error surfaced during test Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Main moderation line layer src/components/main/maps/source/moderations/LinesAndPointsByModeration.tsx Expanded hit layer uses transparent color and line-opacity: 0; no white paint should be visible.
Click target size src/components/main/maps/source/moderations/LinesAndPointsByModeration.tsx Hit layer width increased from currentLineWidth * 4 to currentLineWidth * 5, expanding the click/tap area without changing visible stroke width.
Development parity src/components/development/maps/source/moderations/LinesAndPointsByModeration.tsx Development mirror matches the main implementation to avoid environment drift.
Event binding src/components/main/maps/source/moderations/ModerationMapEvents.tsx Existing handlers already include moderationIdSourceLayerLinesOutline, so the transparent hit layer remains clickable.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/blue-line-click.spec.ts Production test verifies visible-line click and off-line click/tap behavior on desktop and mobile.

Additional Data Check

  • 0BqqNUob52zQdXG7DIG4?d=43.47026945460061,-3.6050878777625712,18.792860897215693 was also tried, but the automated helper could not reliably detect enough blue-line pixels in that viewport, so it was not used as passing evidence for the click-area assertion.

Bug Notes

  • No white expanded-area artifact observed in the passing production evidence.
  • The expanded hit layer is expected to be invisible/transparent while still clickable.

🎥 Test Evidence

module-maps-blue-line-clic-49807-pens-the-pano-on-mobile-79--chromium.mp4
module-maps-blue-line-clic-86644-ed-.-off-line-tap-works-79--chromium.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #73: Load Source Marker with Thumbnail on Martin
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #73: Load Source Marker with Thumbnail on Martin

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-marker-thumbnail.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White Panorra map renders Open production Panorra map -> map canvas and source markers render Pass
2 Gray Martin thumbnail source loads /data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} -> vector source returns tiles Pass
3 Black Marker thumbnail is visible Source marker layer -> thumbnail-like marker pixels are painted on the canvas Pass
4 Task Sprint Issue #73 acceptance Martin source marker -> marker displays thumbnail, not only generic fallback Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Thumbnail-like marker patches detected: 9.
  • Martin thumbnail vector source loaded: GET maps.panorra.com/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} -> 200 (x5 in the address-bar recording run).
  • Generic marker icon fallback also loaded successfully: GET maps.panorra.com/icon/markers/64x64-ghost.png -> 200 (x6).
  • Socket used by thumbnail visibility flow responded successfully.
  • HTTP 5xx responses: 0.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com -> MapLibre source panorraThumbnailSource -> Next /data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} -> Martin source tile -> thumbnail marker render.

Request / Service Observed status Count Frontend outcome Review
GET maps.panorra.com/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200 5 Martin thumbnail vector tiles loaded Pass
GET maps.panorra.com/icon/markers/64x64-ghost.png 200 6 Fallback marker icons available while thumbnails load Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/style.json 200 1 Base map style loaded Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/data/openmaptiles.json 200 1 Base map source loaded Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/data/openmaptiles/{z}/{x}/{y}.pbf 200 8 Base map tiles rendered Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/fonts/* 200 9 Map labels available Pass
GET map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/sprite.* 200 2 Map sprite assets available Pass
GET/POST socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200 7 Visibility/thumbnail socket flow reachable Pass
Any backend/API 5xx 0 found 0 No server error surfaced during test Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Martin thumbnail source src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraSource.tsx Uses vector source panorraThumbnailSource with source-layer panorra_thumbnail_source.geom and tile URL /data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y}.
Thumbnail marker rendering src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/Points.tsx Builds panorraThumbnailLayer using dynamic thumbnail-{slug} / thumbnail-{slug}-selected map images.
Thumbnail image generation src/lib/map/renderPanorraMarker.ts Renders post thumbnail into circular marker pin with normal and selected styles.
Visible marker discovery src/hooks/useVisibleMarkers.ts Queries rendered Panorra marker layers and emits visible slugs for thumbnail visibility handling.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-marker-thumbnail.spec.ts Verifies production map render, Martin thumbnail source response, and image-like thumbnail pixels on marker canvas.

Bug Notes

  • No issue found in the production verification for maps.panorra.com.
  • The marker thumbnail layer is visibly painting thumbnail-like pixels on source markers.

🎥 Test Evidence

Address-bar full desktop video:

fullscreen-73-PanorraMarkerThumbnail-AddressBar1040-1782361727804.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #76: Improve The Performance for Thumbnail Marker
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #76: Improve The Performance for Thumbnail Marker

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/optimize-load-panorra.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White Panorra map loads Open production Panorra map -> map mounts and canvas paints Pass
2 Gray Performance budget Map painted time -> under 25000ms budget Pass
3 Black Runtime health Page load -> no uncaught JS errors Pass
4 Task Sprint Issue #76 performance acceptance Thumbnail-marker map remains responsive enough to load within budget Pass

Verified Production Result

  • First measured map paint: 6442ms.
  • First Contentful Paint: 2740ms.
  • Budget validation map paint: 2760ms / 25000ms.
  • Resource count observed: 39 then 42 resources.
  • Transfer size observed: 664KB on first sample.
  • JS errors: 0.
  • Console errors reported by the test: 4, treated by this suite as benign resource/map-console noise.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com -> MapLibre base style/tiles -> Panorra marker sources -> thumbnail marker rendering path.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
Production page https://maps.panorra.com Loaded Map mounted and painted Pass
MapLibre canvas paint Completed Canvas became non-blank Pass
Performance budget 2760ms < 25000ms Load remains inside budget Pass
Uncaught JS errors 0 found No fatal runtime load errors Pass
Backend/API 5xx Not observed in this performance run output No 5xx failure surfaced to the test Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Thumbnail marker source src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraSource.tsx Uses panorraThumbnailSource from Martin thumbnail tiles.
Thumbnail marker layer src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/Points.tsx Uses panorraThumbnailLayer to paint dynamic thumbnail-{slug} images.
Thumbnail render path src/lib/map/renderPanorraMarker.ts Canvas-based thumbnail marker rendering is the main performance-sensitive path.
Visible marker scan src/hooks/useVisibleMarkers.ts Visible marker updates are debounced and triggered by map movement/source events.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/optimize-load-panorra.spec.ts Measures map paint time, FCP/resources, and load health on production.

Bug Notes

  • Production performance test passed within budget.
  • This is QA verification only; no production deploy status is implied by this report.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-76-ThumbnailMarkerPerformance-AddressBar1040-1782363677248.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #75: Integrate a Socket for Thumbnail Marker
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #75: Integrate a Socket for Thumbnail Marker

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-thumbnail-socket.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White Socket-backed Panorra map opens Open production Panorra map -> map mounts, canvas paints, Socket.IO request is made Pass
2 Gray Visible markers emitted Marker source loads visible marker slugs -> frontend emits panorra:visibleMarkers through socket Pass
3 Gray Server visibility response received Socket emit succeeds -> frontend receives panorra:visibleResult or panorra:slugValidation Pass
4 Black Thumbnail marker visual result Socket-validated marker flow completes -> thumbnail-backed markers are visible on map canvas Pass
5 Task Sprint Issue #75 acceptance Thumbnail marker socket integration works on production Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 passed.
  • Socket endpoint observed: https://socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/.
  • Socket requests observed: 4.
  • Client emits observed: panorra:visibleMarkers = 3.
  • Server responses observed: panorra:visibleResult = 3.
  • panorra:slugValidation responses observed: 0 in this run; not required because visible result validation was returned.
  • Thumbnail marker patches detected: 8 during load and 10 on final visible-canvas validation.
  • HTTP 5xx: 0.
  • One 408 was observed on maps.panorra.com/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y}; it did not block the feature because socket validation returned and thumbnail markers were visible.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com -> MapLibre style/tiles -> Panorra thumbnail vector source -> Socket.IO panorra:visibleMarkers -> panorra:visibleResult -> thumbnail marker layer.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
Production page https://maps.panorra.com Loaded Map mounted and canvas painted Pass
Socket.IO handshake/polling socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200 GET/POST Socket transport available Pass
Socket emit panorra:visibleMarkers Observed 3 emits Visible marker slugs were sent to backend socket Pass
Socket response panorra:visibleResult Observed 3 responses Frontend received marker visibility validation Pass
Panorra thumbnail vector source 200 x5, 408 x1 Enough marker source data loaded; feature remained working Pass with note
Map style/tiles/fonts/sprite 200 Base map rendered normally Pass
Backend/API 5xx 0 No server error surfaced to the test Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Socket setup src/app/socket.tsx Creates Socket.IO client from NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCKET_URL and stores the connected socket in appStore.
Embed socket setup src/app/embed/panorra/socket.tsx Same socket initialization path for Panorra embed routes.
Visible marker scanner src/hooks/useVisibleMarkers.ts Queries rendered marker layers, deduplicates by slug, emits panorra:visibleMarkers, and stores ghost markers for later re-request.
Thumbnail socket result handler src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/Points.tsx Listens for panorra:visibleResult and panorra:slugValidation, updates visible/hidden slug stores, and removes invalid/hidden thumbnail images.
Thumbnail marker layer src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/Points.tsx Renders panorraThumbnailLayer using dynamic thumbnail-{slug} / thumbnail-{slug}-selected map images.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-thumbnail-socket.spec.ts Captures Socket.IO requests/payloads, validates socket events, and verifies visible thumbnail marker pixels on production.

Bug Notes

  • No blocker found for issue #75 on production.
  • Socket integration is verified by both network/socket payload evidence and visible map result.
  • The single 408 tile response should be monitored, but this run confirms it does not break thumbnail marker socket behavior.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-75-ThumbnailMarkerSocket-ReRecordClean-1782369001500.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #67: Implement Second Click Pin to View Post Detail Panorra
issues.main_description_html:
Module: Panorra Map

QA Tester Summary - Issue #67: Implement Second Click Pin to View Post Detail Panorra

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-second-click-detail.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952
Status: Passed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White mobile_panorra_embed_pins Open Panorra mobile embed with marker pins -> map renders and markers are available Pass
2 Gray first_tap_marker_selected First tap on marker -> marker context/popup opens without post detail event Pass
3 Black second_tap_same_marker_detail Second tap on same marker -> MAP_PANORRA_CLICK emitted for Panorra post detail Pass
4 Response no_http_5xx Production requests during flow -> no HTTP 5xx response Pass
5 Task Sprint Issue #67 acceptance Mobile first tap selects pin, second tap opens detail through postMessage event Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 passed.
  • Production route tested: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=-10%2C25%2C3.5&forceMobile=true.
  • Mobile path simulated with forceMobile=true.
  • First tap selected/opened the Panorra marker context and did not emit MAP_PANORRA_CLICK.
  • Second tap on the same marker emitted MAP_PANORRA_CLICK.
  • Captured payload:
    • slug: z8da82372b2-2023042530082103
    • coordinates.lat: 14.934169899342706
    • coordinates.lng: -23.5107421875
    • coordinates.zoom: 3.5
  • HTTP 5xx: 0.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra -> MapLibre style/tiles -> Panorra thumbnail vector source/socket -> marker click postMessage.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
Production embed page https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra Loaded Map mounted and canvas painted Pass
Base style, tiles, fonts, sprite 200 Base map rendered correctly Pass
Panorra thumbnail vector source maps.panorra.com/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200 x6 Marker candidates were available and clickable Pass
Socket.IO socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200 Panorra socket transport available Pass
MAP_PANORRA_CLICK postMessage Emitted on second tap Parent/mobile detail trigger received payload Pass
HTTP 5xx 0 No server-error response surfaced Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Marker click behavior src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraMapEvents.tsx Mobile mode distinguishes first tap from second tap on the same marker. First tap sets marker state; second tap sends MAP_PANORRA_CLICK.
Detail payload src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraMapEvents.tsx Payload includes slug and coordinates with lat, lng, and current zoom, matching detail-view needs.
Mobile mode trigger src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraMapEvents.tsx forceMobile=true enables mobile behavior for production QA without local build.
PostMessage sender src/components/development/maps/container/panorra/PostMessage Used by Panorra map event handler to emit MAP_PANORRA_CLICK to the parent/mobile listener.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-second-click-detail.spec.ts Covers render, first tap without detail event, second tap with detail event, and HTTP 5xx guard against production.

Bug Notes

  • None found for the verified #67 flow.
  • This is QA verification only; no local build or development implementation was used.

Test Evidence

  • Video: qa_testing/reports/videos/fullscreen-67-SecondClickPinDetail-AddressBar1040-1782373609595.mp4
  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Implement_Second_Click_Pin_to_View_Post_Detail_Panorra_67-white-mobile-map-pins.png
  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Implement_Second_Click_Pin_to_View_Post_Detail_Panorra_67-gray-first-tap-marker-selected.png
  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Implement_Second_Click_Pin_to_View_Post_Detail_Panorra_67-black-second-tap-detail-event.png

🎥 Test Evidence

issues.display_title: Issue #64: Implement View Nearby Button at Marker Panorra Maps
issues.main_description_html:
• Redirect Button to Nearby Feeds Panorra PWA
  • Send Lat Long Marker Post on click button
  • Enable Panorra Mobile to get Lat Long Marker Post on click
  • Enable Panorra PWA to get Lat Long Marker Post on click button

QA Tester Summary - Issue #64: Implement View Nearby Button at Marker Panorra Maps

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-nearby-button-deprecated.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952
Status: Passed as production verification; issue looks deprecated / no longer applicable

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White pwa_popup_action_check Open Panorra marker popup -> inspect action buttons Pass
2 Gray pwa_redirect_check Click available popup action -> confirm it is not Nearby feed redirect Pass
3 Black mobile_webview_payload_check Open mobile/WebView popup -> confirm no Nearby lat/lng button payload Pass
4 Response no_http_5xx Production requests during flow -> no HTTP 5xx response Pass
5 Task Sprint Issue #64 checklist Nearby redirect + marker lat/lng button flow should exist Deprecated candidate / not present in current production

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 passed.
  • Production routes tested:
    • https://maps.panorra.com/?d=-10%2C25%2C3.5
    • https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=-10%2C25%2C3.5&forceMobile=true
  • Current popup action did not expose a Nearby button.
  • PWA click flow opened current post detail/share URL instead of Nearby feed:
    • https://panorra.com/share/z8da82372b2-2023042530082103
  • No /nearby, /feed, or equivalent Nearby feed redirect was observed.
  • Mobile/WebView popup did not emit a marker lat/lng payload for the old Nearby flow.
  • Clean run mobile observation:
    • popup buttons: []
    • MAP_PANORRA_VIEW_DETAIL: 0
    • Nearby lat/lng payload: not emitted
  • HTTP 5xx: 0.

Deprecated Checklist Review

Issue #64 checkbox Current production result QA review
Redirect Button to Nearby Feeds Panorra PWA Not observed. Available PWA action opened panorra.com/share/{slug} instead. Deprecated candidate
Send Lat Long Marker Post on click button Not observed. Current action does not send marker lat/lng for Nearby flow. Deprecated candidate
Enable Panorra Mobile to get Lat Long Marker Post on click Not observed. Mobile/WebView flow did not emit marker lat/lng from a Nearby button. Deprecated candidate
Enable Panorra PWA to get Lat Long Marker Post on click button Not observed. PWA flow opens share/detail, not Nearby lat/lng. Deprecated candidate

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com / https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra -> MapLibre style/tiles -> Panorra marker source/socket -> popup action inspection.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
Production PWA page https://maps.panorra.com Loaded Map mounted and marker popup opened Pass
Production embed page https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra 200 Mobile/WebView map mounted and marker popup opened Pass
Base style, tiles, fonts, sprite 200 Base map rendered correctly Pass
Panorra thumbnail vector source maps.panorra.com/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200 x6 Marker candidates available Pass
Socket.IO socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200, with small 400 close/transport noise Socket traffic did not block map/popup verification Pass with note
HTTP 5xx 0 No server-error response surfaced Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Panorra popup action src/components/main/maps/ui/CustomPopup.tsx Current popup renders View Panorama when buttons are enabled; there is no Nearby button in this component.
Current button handler src/components/main/maps/ui/CustomPopup.tsx handleViewPanorama sends MAP_PANORRA_VIEW_DETAIL with slug in embedded contexts, or opens https://panorra.com/share/{slug} outside embedded contexts.
Current payload src/components/main/maps/ui/CustomPopup.tsx The button payload does not include marker lat/lng; it is slug/detail oriented.
Mobile/WebView sender src/helpers/postMessage.ts Generic sender supports ReactNativeWebView, but no #64 Nearby lat/lng event type or payload was observed from the current popup action.
Related QA history qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-remove-nearby-button.spec.ts Existing #72 QA explicitly verifies the old Nearby button is removed, supporting #64 as deprecated/overridden by newer behavior.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-nearby-button-deprecated.spec.ts Verifies production PWA and mobile/WebView behavior against the #64 checklist and records the deprecated state.

Bug Notes

  • No production bug found for the current behavior.
  • Issue #64 appears deprecated because the requested Nearby button and marker lat/lng button payload are not present in the current Panorra popup flow.
  • Current production behavior is post-detail/share oriented (View Panorama / MAP_PANORRA_VIEW_DETAIL) and also aligns with the later #72 task that removes the Nearby button.
  • This is QA verification only; no local build or development implementation was used.

Test Evidence

  • Video: qa_testing/reports/videos/fullscreen-64-NearbyButtonDeprecated-AddressBar1040-Clean-1782376240551.mp4
  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Verify_64_current_production_behavior_deprecated_candidate-white-pwa-popup-no-nearby-button.png
  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Verify_64_current_production_behavior_deprecated_candidate-gray-pwa-button-opens-share-not-nearby.png
  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Verify_64_current_production_behavior_deprecated_candidate-black-mobile-view-detail-no-lat-lng-nearby.png

🎥 Test Evidence

issues.display_title: Issue #65: Separate main and dev page
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #65: Separate main and dev page

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/separate-main-dev-page.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.gothru.co and https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952
Status: Passed

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White production_main_route Open production main page -> public map loads normally Pass
2 Gray dev_playground_protection Open /dev/playground without access -> redirected/blocked by access-code gate Pass
3 Black public_embed_route Open /embed/panorra -> public embed map loads Pass
4 Black development_embed_route Open /development/embed/panorra -> separate development embed map loads Pass
5 Response no_http_5xx Production requests during flow -> no HTTP 5xx response Pass
6 Task Sprint Issue #65 title Main/public and dev pages should be separated Pass with code-review notes

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 passed.
  • Production main route verified:
    • https://maps.gothru.co/?d=47.573722379712024%2C7.569044256497364%2C18
    • Map mounted and rendered successfully.
  • Dev playground protection verified:
    • Requested https://maps.gothru.co/dev/playground
    • Observed /dev?redirect=... access-code gate.
    • Dev playground was not publicly reachable without dev access.
  • Public embed route verified:
    • https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=-10%2C25%2C3.5
    • Map mounted and rendered successfully.
  • Development embed route verified:
    • https://maps.panorra.com/development/embed/panorra?d=-10%2C25%2C3.5
    • Map mounted and rendered successfully as a separate route.
  • HTTP 5xx: 0.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: production main/dev route navigation -> Next.js route rendering -> MapLibre style/tiles/vector sources -> dev access gate.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
GET https://maps.gothru.co/?d=... < 500, page loaded Main map mounted Pass
GET https://maps.gothru.co/dev/playground < 500, redirected/blocked Access-code gate displayed Pass
GET https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=... < 500, page loaded Public embed map mounted Pass
GET https://maps.panorra.com/development/embed/panorra?d=... < 500, page loaded Development embed map mounted Pass
Map style/fonts/sprite from map-embed-orig.gothru.co 200 Base map rendered correctly Pass
maps.gothru.co/data/moderation_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200 x10 Main moderation vector source loaded Pass
socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200 Socket traffic did not block map rendering Pass
HTTP 5xx 0 No server-error response surfaced Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Main route switch src/app/page.tsx Main production page reads headers().get('development') === 'true' and passes it to MapContainer. This means the root page still has a header-driven dev switch even though separate dev pages now exist. Not exposed through normal browser navigation, but worth reviewing if #65 intended full code-level isolation.
Main container split src/components/main/maps/container/main/MapContainer.tsx The shared main container conditionally imports/renders main or development map events, sources, satellite controls, and location marker based on isDevelopment.
Separate development embed src/app/development/embed/panorra/page.tsx Development embed is a dedicated route and imports the development Panorra map container directly. Production verification confirms this route loads separately.
Dev access gate src/app/dev/layout.tsx /dev/* routes are protected by checkDevAccess() and redirect unauthenticated users back to /dev?redirect=...; production verification confirms the access-code gate.
Dev access token src/data/layer/devAccess.ts Dev access depends on a dev-access cookie and /tmp/gothru-maps/dev-access.txt, preventing ordinary public access to /dev/playground.
Panorra source parity src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraSource.tsx and src/components/development/maps/source/panorra/PanorraSource.tsx These files are currently effectively identical and both import components/development/maps/ui/CustomPopup. This does not break the production QA flow, but it is a code-review note if the task requires strict main/dev component separation.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/separate-main-dev-page.spec.ts Covers production main route, dev playground protection, public embed, development embed, and HTTP 5xx regression check.

Bug Notes

  • No production bug found in the tested user-facing route separation.
  • Code review notes remain for the team:
    • Root production route still supports development: true request-header switching.
    • Main and development Panorra source files are currently identical and import the development popup component.
  • These notes are not marked as a failed QA result because normal production browser navigation keeps /dev/playground protected and /development/embed/panorra separate.
  • This is QA verification only; no local build or development implementation was used.

issues.display_title: Issue #60: Fix bug marker unselects itself
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #60: Fix bug marker unselects itself

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-marker-does-not-unselect.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952
Status: Passed

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White mobile_embed_marker_area Open Panorra mobile embed -> map and thumbnail markers render Pass
2 Gray tap_marker_selects_marker Tap visible marker -> selected marker appears Pass
3 Black selected_marker_idle_hover_persistence Wait and move/hover around map -> selected marker remains visible Pass
4 Black click_selected_marker_persistence Click selected marker itself -> selected marker remains visible Pass
5 Control explicit_clear_marker Send MAP_CLEAR_ACTIVE_MARKER -> selected marker clears only by explicit command Pass
6 Response no_http_5xx Production requests during flow -> no HTTP 5xx response Pass
7 Task Sprint Issue #60 title Selected marker should not unselect itself Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 passed.
  • Production route tested:
    • https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=-10%2C25%2C3.5&forceMobile=true
  • Map and thumbnail markers rendered successfully.
  • Visible marker tap created selected marker state.
  • Selected marker stayed visible after:
    • idle wait,
    • mouse movement / hover around map,
    • click on selected marker itself.
  • Explicit MAP_CLEAR_ACTIVE_MARKER removed selected marker as expected.
  • HTTP 5xx: 0.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra -> MapLibre style/tiles -> Panorra thumbnail vector source/socket -> marker selection state.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
Production embed page https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=...&forceMobile=true Loaded Map mounted and marker selection flow executed Pass
Map style, sprite, fonts from map-embed-orig.gothru.co 200 Base map rendered correctly Pass
Base tiles map-embed-orig.gothru.co/data/openmaptiles/{z}/{x}/{y}.pbf 200 Map tiles rendered Pass
Panorra thumbnail vector source maps.panorra.com/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200 x6 Thumbnail marker candidates available Pass
Ghost marker icon maps.panorra.com/icon/markers/64x64-ghost.png 200 x6 Marker icons available Pass
Socket.IO socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200 Socket traffic did not block marker selection Pass
HTTP 5xx 0 No server-error response surfaced Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Selected marker state src/stores/MapsStore.ts selectedPanorra is stored separately from transient popup state, which supports persistent selected marker behavior.
Marker selection event src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraMapEvents.tsx On mobile first tap, handleMobileFirstClick sets both panorraStore and selectedPanorra; second tap on same marker emits detail click instead of clearing selection.
Empty map click behavior src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraMapEvents.tsx Empty map clicks reset panorraStore popup state only when popup is open; this QA did not observe selected marker clearing itself during normal idle/hover/click-on-marker flow.
Explicit clear behavior src/components/main/maps/container/panorra/PostMessage.tsx MAP_CLEAR_ACTIVE_MARKER explicitly sets selectedPanorra(null), and QA verified this still clears the marker when requested.
Selected marker rendering src/components/main/maps/container/panorra/MapContainer.tsx The selected marker DOM image renders from maps.selectedPanorra and selected thumbnail image data.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-marker-does-not-unselect.spec.ts Covers mobile embed marker selection, persistence after idle/hover/click, explicit clear control, and HTTP 5xx regression check.

Bug Notes

  • No production bug found for the tested user-facing marker selection flow.
  • The issue only had a title and no description, so QA scoped acceptance to the observable marker behavior: selected marker should remain selected until an explicit clear/action removes it.
  • This is QA verification only; no local build or development implementation was used.

Test Evidence

  • Video: qa_testing/reports/videos/fullscreen-60-MarkerDoesNotUnselect-AddressBar1040-MobileTap-1782383295063.mp4

  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Fix_bug_marker_unselects_itself_60-control-explicit-clear-removes-selected-marker.png

issues.display_title: Issue #70: Add selected marker state to thumbnail marker
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #70: Add selected marker state to thumbnail marker

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-selected-thumbnail-marker.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952
Status: Failed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White Open Panorra embed in marker/post area Open production embed at real Panorra post coordinates -> map mounts and canvas paints Pass
2 Gray Activate selected post marker Send MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE for a real post -> selected marker image should be created Fail
3 Black Selected marker visual state Selected marker image -> should show red/pink selected outline Blocked by Gray failure
4 Task Sprint Issue #70 acceptance Thumbnail marker has selected state on production Fail

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 failed.
  • Production route tested: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra.
  • Test post slug: a87e45475f1-2023010631091224.
  • Test coordinates: 45.727439585101536, 7.755419133807436, zoom 16.
  • Trigger used: MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE with slug, coordinates, zoom, and category.
  • Expected selected marker DOM image: img[alt="Selected Panorra Marker"].
  • Actual result: selected marker image was not created within 20s after MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE.
  • Because the selected marker image was missing, red/pink selected outline validation could not run.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=... -> MapLibre style/tiles -> Panorra thumbnail marker source -> MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE -> selected thumbnail marker state.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
Production embed page https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra Loaded Map mounted and canvas painted Pass
MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE postMessage Sent in browser Selected post flow was triggered Pass
Selected marker DOM image Not found img[alt="Selected Panorra Marker"] was not created Fail
Selected red/pink outline Not testable Blocked because selected marker image did not render Fail
Backend/API 5xx Not reached in response-code step because test failed at selected marker assertion No 5xx conclusion from this failed run Not completed

Code Review

Area File Review
Selected marker image generation src/lib/map/renderPanorraMarker.ts Supports selected marker styling via isSelected=true and selected outline color #ea165f.
Thumbnail marker layer src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/Points.tsx Switches panorraThumbnailLayer image to thumbnail-{slug}-selected when maps.selectedPanorra.slug matches the marker slug.
Selected marker overlay src/components/main/maps/container/panorra/MapContainer.tsx Renders img[alt="Selected Panorra Marker"] only when maps.selectedPanorra exists and selected marker image data can be read from the map.
Selected post trigger src/components/main/maps/container/panorra/PostMessage.tsx MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE sets selectedPanorra and flies to the target post, but does not include thumbnail data.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-selected-thumbnail-marker.spec.ts Opens production embed, triggers selected post flow, and expects selected marker image plus selected outline.

Bug Notes

  • Production does not currently show the selected thumbnail marker image for the tested selected-post flow.
  • Likely impact: users may not see a distinct selected state for the active Panorra thumbnail marker.
  • The selected marker image appears dependent on thumbnail-{slug}-selected already being available in the map image cache; when it is not available after MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE, the selected marker overlay is never rendered.

🎥 Test Evidence

issues.display_title: Issue #68: Add Support Post Message for Mobile
issues.main_description_html:
• MAP_LOADED
  • MAP_PANORRA_CLICK
  • SENT: MAP_SET_CURRENT_LOCATION
  • MAP_PANORRA_POSITION
  • SENT: MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE

QA Tester Summary - Issue #68: Add Support Post Message for Mobile

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-mobile-postmessage.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952
Status: Failed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White MAP_LOADED mobile signal Open Panorra embed with mocked ReactNativeWebView -> map sends MAP_LOADED to mobile Fail
2 Gray MAP_PANORRA_POSITION Drag map -> map emits position payload to parent/mobile Pass
3 Gray MAP_PANORRA_CLICK Mobile double-tap marker -> map emits active marker payload Pass
4 Black MAP_SET_CURRENT_LOCATION Mobile sends current-location command -> map recenters and emits position near target Pass
5 Black MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE Mobile sends active-post command -> map recenters and emits position near target Pass
6 Task Sprint Issue #68 checklist All mobile postMessage checklist items work on production Fail

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 failed.
  • Production route tested: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=-10,25,3.5&forceMobile=true.
  • Mobile path simulated with window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage.
  • MAP_LOADED: window=0, react-native=0 observed.
  • MAP_PANORRA_POSITION: emitted after map drag and sent through mobile capture.
  • MAP_PANORRA_CLICK: emitted after mobile-style marker double tap.
  • MAP_SET_CURRENT_LOCATION: accepted from simulated React Native and recentered near London.
  • MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE: accepted from simulated React Native and recentered near Paris.
  • HTTP 5xx: 0.
  • Panorra vector tile source had 200 x14 and 408 x2; the 408 responses did not block the tested postMessage flows.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra -> MapLibre style/tiles -> Panorra marker source/socket -> mobile postMessage bridge.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
Production embed page https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra Loaded Map mounted and canvas painted Pass
Map style/tiles/fonts/sprite 200 Base map rendered Pass
Panorra thumbnail vector source 200 x14, 408 x2 Marker/postMessage flow still continued Pass with note
Socket.IO socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200 GET/POST Panorra socket transport available Pass
MAP_LOADED to mobile WebView Not observed Checklist item missing on production run Fail
HTTP 5xx 0 No server-error response surfaced Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Generic postMessage helper src/helpers/postMessage.ts Sends payloads to window.parent, optional tourFrame, and window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage.
Map load signal src/hooks/useMapLoad.ts Intended to send MAP_LOADED once via sendPostMessage('MAP_LOADED', true). Production QA did not observe this event.
Mobile inbound bridge src/components/main/maps/container/panorra/PostMessage.tsx Sets up receiveMessageFromReactNative and handles MAP_SET_CURRENT_LOCATION / MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE.
Position signal src/components/main/maps/container/panorra/MapEvent.tsx Sends MAP_PANORRA_POSITION on moveend.
Marker click signal src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraMapEvents.tsx In mobile mode, second tap on same marker sends MAP_PANORRA_CLICK.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-mobile-postmessage.spec.ts Covers every checklist item from issue #68 against production with mocked ReactNativeWebView.

Bug Notes

  • Main blocker: MAP_LOADED was not emitted to the mocked mobile WebView in production (0 messages observed).
  • Other checklist items were verified in the same run: MAP_PANORRA_CLICK, MAP_PANORRA_POSITION, MAP_SET_CURRENT_LOCATION, and MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE.
  • This is QA verification only; no local build or development implementation was used.

issues.display_title: Issue #61: Update thumbnail generation v2 (save to s3)
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #61: Update thumbnail generation v2 (save to s3)

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-thumbnail-v2-s3.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952
Status: Failed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White collect_real_panorra_slugs Panorra production vector/source data -> collect real post slugs for thumbnail-v2 sampling Pass
2 Gray thumbnail_v2_png_bytes GET /thumbnail-v2/{slug} -> HTTP 200, image/png, and actual PNG bytes Fail
3 Black browser_image_decode Render sampled thumbnail-v2 URLs as <img> -> all images decode with non-zero natural size Fail
4 Response no_http_5xx Production requests during flow -> no HTTP 5xx response Pass
5 Task Sprint Issue #61 acceptance Thumbnail generation v2 should serve saved/generated image from API/S3/fallback, not broken JSON-as-image Fail

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 failed.
  • Production endpoint tested: https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail-v2/{slug}.
  • Sampled slugs:
    • ef7bfdd1af7-2026013007275300
    • ve6ce6dcf65-2025072514245400
    • m407eaf0e2c-2025072514354100
    • ed3edb2c127-2025040402171600
    • uab6a9636ac-2025040217034100
  • Endpoint status/content-type:
    • All sampled requests returned HTTP 200.
    • All sampled responses reported content-type: image/png.
  • Actual response body validation:
    • 1/5 sampled responses contained real PNG bytes.
    • 4/5 sampled responses contained JSON body text instead of PNG bytes.
  • Browser decode validation:
    • ef7bfdd1af7-2026013007275300: decoded 255x255.
    • ve6ce6dcf65-2025072514245400: decoded 0x0.
    • m407eaf0e2c-2025072514354100: decoded 0x0.
    • ed3edb2c127-2025040402171600: decoded 0x0.
    • uab6a9636ac-2025040217034100: decoded 0x0.
  • HTTP 5xx: 0.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail-v2/{slug} -> internal Panorra thumbnail API -> S3 fallback / placeholder image fallback.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
GET /thumbnail-v2/ef7bfdd1af7-2026013007275300 200 image/png, PNG bytes Browser image decodes 255x255 Pass
GET /thumbnail-v2/ve6ce6dcf65-2025072514245400 200 image/png, JSON body Browser image is broken/blank 0x0 Fail
GET /thumbnail-v2/m407eaf0e2c-2025072514354100 200 image/png, JSON body Browser image is broken/blank 0x0 Fail
GET /thumbnail-v2/ed3edb2c127-2025040402171600 200 image/png, JSON body Browser image is broken/blank 0x0 Fail
GET /thumbnail-v2/uab6a9636ac-2025040217034100 200 image/png, JSON body Browser image is broken/blank 0x0 Fail
HTTP 5xx 0 No server-error response surfaced Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Thumbnail v2 route src/app/thumbnail-v2/[slug]/route.ts If the upstream API returns HTTP 200, the route forwards the upstream body as image/png without validating that the body is actually image bytes.
Failure mode src/app/thumbnail-v2/[slug]/route.ts Production still shows JSON response bodies wrapped as image/png, which makes browser <img> decode fail.
S3 fallback path src/app/thumbnail-v2/[slug]/route.ts S3 fallback only runs when the upstream API returns 404; it does not run when upstream returns 200 with a JSON post payload.
Queue generation src/data/layer/panorra.ts queuePanorraGenerateThumbnail(slug) exists for generation, but production failure indicates the current route does not reach fallback/generation when upstream returns JSON with HTTP 200.
Regression history qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-blank-map-detail.spec.ts Existing #47 QA documented the same class of bug: thumbnail-v2 can return JSON labelled as image, causing blank map thumbnails.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-thumbnail-v2-s3.spec.ts Samples real production slugs, validates PNG magic bytes, renders images in browser, and guards HTTP 5xx.

Bug Notes

  • Main issue: thumbnail-v2 can return JSON/non-image data while declaring content-type: image/png.
  • Browser treats these as broken images; sampled failing thumbnails decoded to naturalWidth=0, naturalHeight=0.
  • This means the v2 thumbnail generation/S3 fallback is not reliable for current production data.
  • This is QA verification only; no local build or development implementation was used.

Test Evidence

  • Video: qa_testing/reports/videos/fullscreen-61-ThumbnailV2S3-AddressBar1040-Rerecord-1782377813799.mp4
  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Update_thumbnail_generation_v2_save_to_s3_61-black-thumbnail-v2-images-decode.png

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-61-ThumbnailV2S3-AddressBar1040-Rerecord-1782377813799.mp4
